evals.prompt: Quick capture this: https://anthropic.com/research/claude-character — their new post about Claude's character and identity
evals.expected_output: A structured entry is appended to input/2026-04-20.md using the template (### HH:MM — title, src, tags, brief content). No wiki pages are created. Confirmation is returned in under one sentence. No URL fetching happens.
assertions: An entry was appended to input/2026-04-20.md
The entry starts with ### followed by a time and title
The src line contains the URL
No wiki/ files were created or modified
The confirmation message is one sentence or less

evals.prompt: Note this down: Platform Innovation team agreed to split the Starter Pack milestone into two phases — MVP by end of April, polish by mid-May. Viktor confirmed.
evals.expected_output: Entry appended to input/2026-04-20.md with src: note, relevant tags (platform-innovation, starter-pack), and the note content verbatim. No wiki updates.
assertions: An entry was appended to input/2026-04-20.md
The entry includes the key facts (MVP, April, Viktor)
src is set to note or personal
tags include something related to platform-innovation or starter-pack
No wiki/ files were created or modified

evals.prompt: Good morning! Quick capture: https://newsletter.pragmaticengineer.com/p/ai-agents-2025 — interesting read on AI agent architectures
evals.expected_output: Since this is the first capture of the day (input/2026-04-20.md does not exist), the skill should: (1) check log.md for 2026-04-19 — since there IS an entry for 2026-04-17 but nothing for 2026-04-18 or 2026-04-19, check input/ for those dates; (2) generate a morning briefing covering active projects and suggestions; (3) append the URL capture entry; (4) confirm briefly. Background agent may be spawned if unprocessed input files exist for those days.
assertions: The daily briefing is shown with active projects section
The daily briefing includes suggested focus items
An entry for the URL is appended to input/2026-04-20.md
The response time is fast — no URL was fetched
The confirmation is concise (not re-explaining everything)
